completeness.notes: Drafted from krexa.mintlify.app/docs/api/* and www.krexa.xyz/developers. Covers KYA (4), Score (1), Credit (4 incl. score-breakdown only doc'd on the dev landing page + request-credit discovered via wire probing), Oracle (1), Vault (1), Faucet (1), Access (1 — provision-key, dev page only), Pay.sh (11). KyaCredential inner shape is left as a loose object with additionalProperties:true — the 7 sections (identity, principal, permissions, score, reputation, financial, attestation) are not fully reified upstream. ScoreResponse is also left loose: deeply-nested numerics produced fragile integer/float mismatches under tighten-spec single-sample inference. Enum-valued string fields (trustTier, ScoreResponse.source, PayshTier.tier, PayshPricing.network) are plain strings to avoid progenitor `*Type/*Status/*Tier` inline-enum collisions. POST /solana/credit/{agent}/request is undocumented upstream — discovered via 403 from sign-credit + 400 validation pass. The Ed25519 challenge format for `ownerSignature` is a best-guess (`Krexa credit request for <ownerPubkey>`, mirroring /access/provision-key); confirm with the Krexa team and adjust apps/krexa/src/auth.rs::CREDIT_REQUEST_CHALLENGE_PREFIX if wrong. Auth shims live at apps/krexa/src/auth.rs (KREXA_API_KEY for the X-API-Key header; KREXA_OWNER_SECRET_KEY base58 64-byte Solana keypair for Ed25519 owner signatures). Two servers listed: production api.krexa.xyz and the Render origin (cold-start 30-60s).
